_comment: Customise this file then run: node scripts/generate-gpx-guide.js
guideSubtitle: How to extract course GPX data from AllTrails and embed it in race templates
prerequisites: Playwright installed (already in the project — run npx playwright install chromium if needed)
An AllTrails account with the custom race routes saved
The RaceTracker Pro repository cloned locally

races.name: Pinnacles Classic
races.notes: Confirmed URL from network capture. Should decode to Gold Creek / Mt Glorious area coordinates.

races.name: Mt Glorious Mountain Trail
races.notes: Find this route on AllTrails — search near Maiala Picnic Area, Mt Glorious Rd.

races.name: Brisbane Trail Marathon
races.notes: Find this route on AllTrails — search near Enoggera Reservoir, The Gap.

races.name: Lake Manchester Trail
races.notes: Find this route on AllTrails — search near Lake Manchester Dam Wall.
